summary: Iteration 2 testing of Player Profile and Response Tracker features. All 8 backend tests pass. All frontend flows verified: Profile page renders correctly, edit/save works with success message, Response Tracker shows stats (49 contacted, 46 awaiting, 3 received), Log Reply modal works and updates college status to Replied, AI Follow-up generates detailed strategy from AI, Compose page loads with profile data pre-filled. Navigation 'Responses' link present.

design_issues.screen: Log Reply modal - Date Received field
issues: Uses browser native date picker (mm/dd/yyyy) - minor UX inconsistency, same as noted in iteration_1 for Strategy page

seed_data_creation: Backend tests logged 2 additional replies during testing (Florida Southern College, Truman State University status changed to Replied)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 2 complete. Profile page fully working (GET/PUT /api/profile). Response Tracker fully working (GET /api/responses/summary, POST /api/emails/log-reply, POST /api/ai/follow-up). Stats: 49 contacted, ~46 awaiting, ~3 received after testing. Compose page pre-fills position from profile (Shooting Guard). Navigation has all 8 items including Responses. No bugs found.
